Assembly macros for ARMv7, x86-32, and x86-64 architectures for system calls and context operations.


## Files
- **[arm-v7.h](arm-v7.h.md)**: ARMv7 assembly macros for system calls, program start, and context switching in the Pebble firmware.
- **[x86-32.h](x86-32.h.md)**: Assembly macros for x86-32 architecture to perform system calls, setjmp, and longjmp operations.
- **[x86-64.h](x86-64.h.md)**: Assembly macros for x86-64 architecture to perform system calls, setjmp, and longjmp operations.
